subject: A massive, bloated deep-sea horror creature bristling with tentacles and covered in a ribbed carapace-like body, floating in dark underwater space
description: An enormous creature dominates the frame — its body is a swollen, ribbed mass of deep purple, dark pink, and fleshy tones, textured with webbing, ridges, and what appear to be clustered orifices or sensory organs. Multiple thick tentacles extend from the lower body, and shorter claw-like appendages protrude from the sides. The overall silhouette resembles a deep-sea invertebrate, enlarged to monstrous scale. In the distant background, angular geometric shapes — possibly floating crystals or ruins — are barely visible through the dark blue water. No humanoid features are present.
foreground: enormous tentacled carapace creature in dark water
background: dark underwater void with faint geometric shapes
